global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a logo, a headline, and a call-to-action button.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to earn cashback with a simple signup process.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: EarnPath logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'EarnPath' in a bold font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one circular and one rectangular, in a muted color palette.

elements.label: Cashback offer
elements.description: A prominent headline in bold white text stating 'Earn cashback daily' against a contrasting background.
elements.text_content: Earn cashback daily Fast signup instant card

elements.label: Shop now button
elements.description: A bright button with the text 'Shop now' in a clear, readable font, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Signup details
elements.description: Smaller text below the headline that reads 'Fast signup, instant card', providing additional information.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the headline in the center, with the body text below it, and the CTA button at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Earn cashback daily, Fast signup, instant card, Shop now, EarnPath
